title: Baby4Ever
description: Adds a way to make baby mobs, babies PERMANENTLY!!
body:
# READ THIS

## Minecraft added this functionality to the actual game! Yippe!!!!

# READ THIS

~~# Baby4Ever Datapack~~

~~Keeps baby mobs as babies forever. Drop a diamond on a baby mob to freeze its age. Drop an iron ingot to unfreeze it.~~

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/HQNjVilcgjk?si=yD9VvBrRqn5B8ydq" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

~~## Features~~
~~* Locks baby age so they don't grow up.~~
~~* Player bound: Only the person who froze it (or the owner if it's a pet) can unfreeze it.~~
~~* Works on tamed animals too.~~

~~## How to use~~
~~1. Drop a Diamond on a baby mob. It eats the diamond and stays a baby.~~
~~2. To unfreeze, drop an Iron Ingot on it. You have to be the one who froze it originally.~~

~~## Commands~~
~~* /function baby4ever:admin/unfreeze_nearest - Force unfreeze the mob nearest to you.~~
~~* /function baby4ever:admin/unfreeze_all - Force unfreeze everything.~~
~~* /function baby4ever:admin/toggle_debug - Turn on debug messages in chat.~~
